case_title: KAM HING MARBLE LLC. VS. YOSSI ELFAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,713.63 FILED BY KAM HING MARBLE LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT ELFAR, YOSSI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED (KAN FAN CHEUNG APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM HING MARBLE LLC.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE "THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND." FEE FOR SERVICE" $35.00. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM HING MARBLE LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT ELFAR, YOSSI

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
